tasks.title: Confirm the build approach
tasks.expectedOutput: Implementation plan with boundaries, risks, tests, and handoff notes
tasks.resultSummary: Architecture response recorded. The implementation task remains subject to repository evidence and Founder OS validation.

tasks.title: Implement the approved package
tasks.requiredInput: Art-approved implementation plan, canonical NN-BUILD-001 package, repository access, and acceptance criteria
tasks.expectedOutput: Tested repository changes with a verifiable GitHub pull request URL and CI or test evidence

retryContext.reason: The provider requested missing input and produced no implementation, tests, or pull request.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Do not complete this task without a real GitHub pull request URL and test or CI evidence.

tasks.title: Review the experience
tasks.requiredInput: Working preview, acceptance criteria, and verified AI-TASK-002 implementation evidence
tasks.expectedOutput: Concrete usability, responsive design, and accessibility findings with pass/fail evidence

retryContext.reason: The provider requested the preview and acceptance criteria instead of performing a review.

tasks.title: Prepare the Founder review
tasks.requiredInput: Verified implementation results and populated design review findings
tasks.expectedOutput: A completed plain-English summary of what changed, what passed, risks, and the exact Founder decision required

retryContext.reason: The provider returned an unpopulated placeholder summary.
